Metadata.title: Quiet Riots
Metadata.description: Njangalkkoru shared issues-um chernum. Njangalude people find cheyyu. Together action edukku.

Footer.mission: Njangalude jeevakalil better-aayi change cheyyuka, imagine pannum pole kariyulla.
Footer.powered: Quiet Riots · Powered by OpenClaw AI Agent

Home.headline: Change loud-aakanda powerful-aakam
Home.description: Njangalkkoru issues share cheyyana others find cheyyu. Together action edukku. Quiet Riots people-ne connect cheyyu shared frustrations-um, complaints-ne collective action-aakki convert cheyyu.
Home.findYourIssueDesc: Ninte frustration search cheyyu — trains, broadband, NHS, climate. Irunnaal kittiyan kittyam.
Home.useThePivotDesc: Same issue saari organisations-inde, ya all issues oru organisation-inde. Tango dancers pole direction change cheyyu.
Home.takeActionDesc: Ideas, actions, community — ninte time-um skills-um personalized.
Home.missionQuote: "Njangalude jeevakalil better-aayi change cheyyuka, imagine pannum pole kariyulla."
Home.basedOn: Based on the 2014 book Quiet Riots by Simon Darling

Issues.title: Issues
Issues.subtitle: {count} issues {categoryCount} categories-inde. Ninte issue find cheyyu.
Issues.noResults: Issues find ayyilla. Different search ya category try cheyyu.

IssueDetail.gatherEvidenceDesc: Ntan aanu happen cheyyana document cheyyu — live go cheyyu ya photos, videos, links share cheyyu.

IssueDetail.expertsDesc: Passionate volunteers deeper po — translators, specialists, media leads, legal advisors.
IssueDetail.pendingBanner: Iye Quiet Riot review-inde aanu — evidence gather cheyya pattum aum thoughts share cheyya pattum review-aakunna samayam.

OrgDetail.paretoDesc: Few issues-inde 80% complaints-um aanu. Top issues rank cheyyunna number-inde people affected.

AssistantDetail.openRole: Human organiser role open aanu anyone-kku passion undayaal iye category-kku. Interest express cheyyu below.

RejectionReasons.title: Quiet Riots Reject Akunna Karanam
RejectionReasons.subtitle: Review process manasilaippu
RejectionReasons.intro: Quiet Riot suggestion ellam Setup Guide review cheykkum platform fit aanu enn, real difference aanu cheyyan patunn enn check cheyyan. Rejection karanangal:
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP1: Ninte suggestion existing Quiet Riot ku similar aanu, merge cheykkum. Community focused razhaan, fragmentation prevent cheyyan. Oru Quiet Riot kku janaakangal aanu anengilum big impact.
RejectionReasons.closeToExistingP2: Ipo happen cheyumbo, existing Quiet Riot le add cheykkum, action start cheyyan pattu.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP1: Quiet Riots issues kurich aanu, individual targeting alla. Systemic problems focus cheykkum — broadband, energy costs, healthcare — personal issues alla.
RejectionReasons.aboutPeopleP2: Specific person kku frustrated aanu, underlying issue framing try cheyy. CEO kru alla, company practices kurich Quiet Riot suggest cheyy.
RejectionReasons.illegalP1: Illegal activities promote cheyyan, organize cheyyan Quiet Riots host cheyyan patilla. Applicable laws violate cheyyan, violence promote cheyyan, risk cheyyan things illa.
RejectionReasons.otherP1: Kaboli suggestion aru karanam fit aay illa — vague aanu, Setup Guide information vendum aanu. Rejection karanam message send cheykkum, next steps ano enn samsarichukkkum.
RejectionReasons.reframe: Reframe cheyy try cheyy upazhum — name, description adjust cheyy guidelines fit cheyy
RejectionReasons.joinExisting: Existing Quiet Riot join cheyy — ninte issue cover aay irann kazhiyum
RejectionReasons.replyGuide: Setup Guide kkku reply cheyy — rejection mistake aanu ennu think cheyumbo, explanation send cheyy

AnonymousInfo.title: Anonymous First Rioters
AnonymousInfo.subtitle: Anonymous akunnatinte meaning
AnonymousInfo.intro: New Quiet Riot start cheyyan person First Quiet Rioter aanu. Honour badge — courage cheyyan speak cheyyan person.
AnonymousInfo.choosingIntro: Ellarkum name public aay show cheyyan vendum alla. Seri. First Quiet Rioter anonymous choose cheyumbo:
AnonymousInfo.choosingHidden: Name, profile picture issue page le hide aanu
AnonymousInfo.choosingBadge: Anonymous badge show aanu, someone start cheyythu enn ariyum, ar enn ariya illa
AnonymousInfo.choosingGuides: Setup Guides ar start cheyythu enn ariyum (moderation kru)
AnonymousInfo.choosingChange: First Rioter later mind change cheyyan, public recognized cheyyan choose cheyyan pattu
AnonymousInfo.whyWork: Company kru work cheykkum issue related
AnonymousInfo.changingP1: Quiet Riot anonymous start cheyythu, later recognize cheyyan decide cheyumbo, anytime preference update cheyyan pattu inbox le, Setup Guide message cheyyan.

FirstRioterInfo.title: First Quiet Rioter
FirstRioterInfo.subtitle: What it means to start a Quiet Riot
FirstRioterInfo.intro: Prathyeka Quiet Riot aadum oru vyakthiyil ninnum thodanguka. Ith oru issue patti sahasa kattu kolla ee vyakti aanu. Athu oru nava parivartan pravasanam thodangukayaan.
FirstRioterInfo.whatIntro: Prathyekam issue raise cheyyan aadum vyakthikku special recognition undu:
FirstRioterInfo.whatBadge: Issue page il permanent First Quiet Rioter badge
FirstRioterInfo.whatRecognition: Public or anonymous ayittu recognise kaatu padanu aanu choice
FirstRioterInfo.whatJoined: Automatic membership pole prathama vyakti Quiet Riot il
FirstRioterInfo.whatNotifications: Updates kunnam suggestion review aavum, approve aavum, ya live aavum
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesTitle: First Rioters Ethinte Sthana Sammatham Cheyyan?
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilitiesIntro: First Rioter badge honour aanu, burden alla. Kittiya requirements illa. Paranjanaal First Rioters kku encourage cheyyan:
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityChampion: Issue champion ayittu share cheyyan aashamsikale ullavark
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityEvidence: Evidence at stories share cheyyan prabham illustrate pannu
FirstRioterInfo.responsibilityWelcome: New members kku welcome cheyyan Quiet Riot join cheyumbol
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionIntro: Prathyeka Quiet Riot suggest cheyumbol enkilum, recognition choice ninne aanu:
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionPublic: Public — your name at profile issue page il appear aavum First Rioter pole
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionAnonymous: Anonymous — anonymous badge show aavum identity protect panna
FirstRioterInfo.recognitionChange: Preference change cheyyan sakshi sakshi anytime inbox ili ya Setup Guide contact cheyyan
FirstRioterInfo.howP1: Website ya WhatsApp bot through new Quiet Riot suggest cheyu. Suggestion approve aavumbol Setup Guides il ninnum, nee ath issue ul First Quiet Rioter aavuka.
FirstRioterInfo.howP2: Suggestion review process undergo cheyyan Setup Guides guidelines check cheyyan. More information ayiyille, existing issue merge suggest cheyyan, ya live aavaan approve cheyyan.

Share.title: Your Quiet Riots Share
Share.profileLink: Learn more about your Quiet Riots share →
Share.heroSubtitle: Every Quiet Rioter worldwide is offered one share in Quiet Riots — the company itself.
Share.ownershipTitle: What Does Owning a Share Mean?
Share.ownershipDesc: As a shareholder, you own a real piece of Quiet Riots. This is not a token, a badge, or a metaphor — it is a genuine share in a UK limited company, registered with Companies House.
Share.ownershipPoint1: You become a legal co-owner of Quiet Riots
Share.ownershipPoint2: Your share grows in value as the company grows
Share.ownershipPoint3: You may receive dividends if the company distributes profits
Share.ownershipPoint4: You have shareholder rights under UK company law
Share.considerationDesc: Under UK company law (Companies Act 2006), shares cannot be issued for free. A nominal payment — called the consideration — is required for the share to be legally valid.
Share.considerationAmount: The consideration for your share is 10 pence (or the equivalent in your local currency).
Share.considerationWallet: This is deducted from your Quiet Riots wallet when you proceed.
Share.considerationRefund: If your application is rejected, the 10p is automatically refunded to your wallet.
Share.growthSharesTitle: How This Works at Different Valuations
Share.growthSharesDesc: Your share uses a growth share structure — a special class that only becomes valuable above a certain company valuation. This means minimal tax at the time of issue.
Share.preSeedDesc: Shares issued at nominal value. You pay 10p. No meaningful tax event.
Share.seedDesc: Same nominal value. Growth share hurdle set above current valuation.
Share.seriesADesc: Pre-emption rights waived for user share pool. Hurdle minimises current value.
Share.seriesBDesc: Growth share hurdle ensures limited current value despite high company valuation.
Share.seriesCDesc: User share pool is a defined cap table percentage. No new dilutive issuances.
Share.ipoDesc: User shares convert to ordinary tradeable shares. Capital gains tax may apply on sale.
Share.responsibilitiesDesc: Owning a share comes with some responsibilities:
Share.responsibility1: Tax obligations depend on your country of residence — consult a qualified advisor
Share.responsibility2: There is no guarantee the company will reach any valuation
Share.responsibility3: The share structure may be modified as the company grows
Share.responsibility4: This is not legal, tax, or investment advice
Share.disclaimer1: This is a simplified explanation — not legal, tax, or investment advice.
Share.disclaimer2: Each user's tax obligations depend on their country of residence.
Share.disclaimer3: There is no guarantee the company will reach any valuation.
Share.disclaimer4: The share structure may be modified as the company grows.
Share.disclaimer5: Users should consult qualified advisors in their own country.
Share.eligibilityDesc: To qualify for the share offer, you need to:
Share.eligibilityVerified: Be a verified user (name and email or phone confirmed)
Share.eligibilityMet: You are eligible for your share!
Share.proceedDesc: Ready to become a shareholder? The 10p consideration will be deducted from your wallet.
Share.proceedConfirm: A nominal payment of 10p will be deducted from your wallet. This is a legal requirement for the share to be valid.
Share.proceedSuccess: Your application has been submitted! A Share Guide will review it shortly.
Share.insufficientFunds: You need at least 10p in your wallet to proceed.
Share.declineDesc: If you don't want a share, you can permanently decline the offer. No payment will be taken.
Share.declineConfirm: Are you sure? This is permanent and cannot be undone. You will never be offered a share again.
Share.declineSuccess: You have declined the share offer.
Share.withdrawDesc: Cancel your application and receive a full refund of your 10p.
Share.withdrawConfirm: Are you sure? Your 10p will be refunded to your wallet.
Share.withdrawSuccess: Your application has been withdrawn. 10p has been refunded to your wallet.
Share.reapplyDesc: Your previous application was rejected. You can reapply with a fresh 10p payment.
Share.passwordDesc: The share section is password-protected for your security.
Share.identityDesc: To complete your share application, we need to verify your identity. This information is encrypted and stored securely.
Share.identitySuccess: Your identity has been submitted for verification.
Share.identityMustBe18: You must be at least 18 years old.
Share.issueEligibilityBanner: You are eligible for your share
Share.issueRequestReceived: Your request has been received. We will be in contact in due course.

BotMessages.noMoreReels: Ee prashnathinaay kaanaatha reels ini illa
BotMessages.verificationEmailSent: {email}-lekk sthireekarana email ayachu. Upayokthaavinnod avarde inbox parishochich link click cheyyaan aavashyappeduka.
BotMessages.verifyEmailPlaceholder: Upayokthaavinn WhatsApp placeholder email aanu ullath. Yathaarttha email sajjamaakkaan link_email upayogikkuka.
BotMessages.shareNeedMore: Yogyatha nedaan ningalkk {riots} kooduthal Quiet Riots um {actions} kooduthal pravarthanangalum aavashyamaanu.
BotMessages.shareEligible: Ningalude Quiet Riots share-in ningal yogyaraanu! Ningalude profile santhershikkuka allenkil thodaraan "apply for share" ennu parayuka.
BotMessages.shareQualified: Ningalude Quiet Riots share-in ningal yogyaraanu!
BotMessages.shareProgress: Purogathi: {riotsJoined}/3 Quiet Riots cherunnu, {actionsTaken}/10 pravarthanangal sweekarichchu{verificationNote}.
BotMessages.shareNotEligible: Share-in ningal ithuvare yogyaralla. Kooduthal Quiet Riots-il cheruka, kooduthal pravarthanangal sweekarikkuka.
BotMessages.shareCannotApplyStatus: Apeekshikkaan kazhiyilla — ningalude nilavile nila {status} aanu.
BotMessages.shareInsufficientBalance: Wallet balance aparyaapthamaanu. Ningalkk kuranjath 10p venam (ningalkk {balance}p und). Aadyam wallet top up cheyyuka.
BotMessages.shareApplied: Ningalude wallet-il ninnu 10p kurachchu. Ningalude share apeeksha ippol avalokanathilaanu. Oru Share Guide udan avalokanam cheyyum.
BotMessages.shareDeclined: Ningal share offer shaashwathamaayi nirasichchu. Payment edutthilla. Ee theerumaanam maattaanaavilla.
BotMessages.shareCannotDecline: Nirasikkaan kazhiyilla — ningalkk yogyamaaya share offer illa allenkil ningalude apeeksha nadannukondirikukayaanu.
BotMessages.shareWithdrawn: Ningalude share apeeksha pinvalichu, ningalude 10p wallet-ilekk thirike nalki.
BotMessages.shareCannotWithdraw: Pinvalikkaan kazhiyilla — ningalude apeeksha pinvalikkaakunna nilayilallayirikkaam.
BotMessages.shareReapplied: Ningalude wallet-il ninnu 10p kurachchu. Ningalude share punarapeeksha ippol avalokanathilaanu.
BotMessages.shareCannotReapply: Veendum apeekshikkaan kazhiyilla — ningalude apeeksha nirasicha nilayilallayirikkaam.
BotMessages.shareQuestionSent: Ningalude chodyam Share Guide team-ilekk ayachu. Ningalkk marupadi ningalude inbox-il labhikkum.
BotMessages.suggestionApproved: Nalla vaarttha — ningalude Quiet Riot "{name}" angeekarichu! Ithu live aakumbol njangal ariyikkaam.
BotMessages.suggestionRejectedWithLink: Ningalude nirddesham "{name}" 👍 labhichilla, kaaranam {reason}. Kooduthal ariyuka: https://www.quietriots.com/info/rejection-reasons
BotMessages.suggestionMerged: Ningalude nirddesham "{name}" nilavilulla oru Quiet Riot-nu samaanamaanu. Njangal ningale cherthu — kaanuka: {link}
BotMessages.suggestionMoreInfo: Setup Guide-nu "{name}" kurichu oru chodyam undu: {notes}
BotMessages.suggestionGoLive: Ningalude Quiet Riot "{name}" ippol live aanu! Ee vishayathil thalparyamulla suhruthukkalumayi panku veykkuka.
BotMessages.rejectionCloseToExisting: nilavilulla oru Quiet Riot-nu valare samanam
BotMessages.alreadyFollowing: Ningal ee Quiet Riot ithinake pindhudharunnum.
BotMessages.maxFollowsBot: Ningalkku 100 vare Quiet Riots pindhudharaan kaziyum.

Chicken.title: Kōḻi vinyas̪iccuka
Chicken.subtitle: Kōḻi ves̪attil̪ ōra-āy-k̠ke nī̐ṅṅal̪ūṭe kāy-eḻutt̪il̪ eḻutt̪iya prat̪iṩēha sandēs̪am ēt̪henk̠kilum sīīō, rāṩṭrīya-yōgyāñ ʻal̪lelṅṅkilum put̪ha-jan vanvyakt̪it̪vatt̪in̪ ett̪hiccān āyaṅṅuka.
Chicken.step1Desc: Ārō sandēs̪am labhiccēndatt̪um evt̪ide av̪are kannett̪āmēnnum ñaṅṅōt̪ parāyuka.
Chicken.step2Desc: Ñaṅṅal̪ūṭe kōḻi kāy elṗpiccunna ōra sandēs̪am (500 varikal̪ vare) nirmmāṇiccuka.
Chicken.step3Desc: Kōḻi ves̪attil̪ ōra yat̪hārt̪t̪ha vyakt̪i phōt̪ō t̪eḷiv̪ ʻupayōgi-ccû nīṅṅal̪ūṭe sandēs̪am ett̪hiccunnu.
Chicken.noDeployments: It̪uvare kōḻi vinyas̪ōgamilℓ. Nīṅṅal̪ūṭe ādy̖ kōḻi vinyas̪iccuka!
Chicken.loginPrompt: Kōḻi vinyas̪ōgam āyaṅṅān nīṅṅal̪k̠k̠u ōra ʻakkaunt̪ āv̪as̪yamāṇ.

ChickenDeploy.title: Kōḻi vinyas̪iccuka
ChickenDeploy.insufficientFunds: ʻApar̥yāpt̪a phandukal̪. Dāyavāy̖ ādy̖m nīṅṅal̪ūṭe vālar̥et̪ nirāyccuka.
ChickenDeploy.networkError: Net̪t̪v̪ork̠ piḻav. Dāyavāy̖ nīṅṅal̪ūṭe kanks̪an̪ pāris̪ōdhiccuka.
